message:
test(e2e): add output mode consistency tests

Add 4 targeted tests verifying output mode behavior across commands:

- e2e_json_stdout_is_clean_json: JSON mode produces valid, ANSI-free
  output across list/ready/blocked/count/stats
- e2e_quiet_reduces_output: --quiet produces less output than normal
- e2e_json_overrides_quiet: --json takes precedence over --quiet
- e2e_no_color_across_commands: --no-color works for list/show/ready/
  stats/count (not just list)

Part of beads_rust-14eu (output mode consistency).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
